mapper.select: SELECT id, ci_value, name, birth_date, gender, phone, enc_ssn, enc_ssn_iv, first_visit_at, last_visit_at, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, ci_value, name, birth_date, gender, phone, enc_ssn, enc_ssn_iv, first_visit_at, last_visit_at, created_at, updated_at FROM patient WHERE ci_value = #{ciValue}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient (ci_value, name, birth_date, gender, phone, first_visit_at, last_visit_at) VALUES (#{ciValue}, #{name}, #{birthDate}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{firstVisitAt}, #{lastVisitAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE patient SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, last_visit_at = #{lastVisitAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
